sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Movement Restriction - Water
special_mechanics.description: Soldiers are slowed when crossing rivers and cannot fire while wading

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Hazard - Quicksand
special_mechanics.description: Quicksand terrain acts as movement impediment

special_mechanics.name: Squad Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls up to 6 soldiers per mission with point-and-click system; squad can be split into smaller units

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Game is primarily tactical/strategy-based action game rather than movement-focused platformer. Sources describe gameplay mechanics and level design but contain no quantified physics parameters. Individual soldier movement mechanics are not documented with numerical values.
